changes_made.description: Baseline run with original verbose skill (9884 bytes SKILL.md + 10 supporting files)

Condensed SKILL.md from 297 lines to 70 lines, removed 10 unreferenced supporting files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, condition-based-waiting-example.ts, find-polluter.sh, CREATION-LOG.md, test-academic.md, test-pressure-1.md, test-pressure-2.md, test-pressure-3.md). Focused on direct debugging process with common bug patterns (off-by-one, race conditions) relevant to tasks.
